title: crataegus oxyacantha var. horrida
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. horrida, also known as the thorny hawthorn, is a variant of the hawthorn tree, characterized by its sharp thorns and red berries. The medicinal properties of Crataegus oxyacantha var. horrida include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and increase circulation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving overall cardiovascular well-being. Herbal preparations of Crataegus oxyacantha var. horrida often include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
